title: Freelance (2002–2005)
body:
Web development for projects such as the 2005 Canary Islands Pain Congress and the Serenity Amadores complex. Flash programming and integration for Miquel Rius (miquelrius.com) and the official Agatha Ruiz de la Prada website.

**Project Manager** (design, programming, maintenance) for the mental health portal esquizo.com. 
Corporate identity and web development for Digital Events, Les Cols, and eLearning workshops.
